bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: An official notice regarding recruitment opportunities at BRAC University has been published.

bracu_official.title: LLB Final Exam Schedule: Spring 2026
bracu_official.summary: The final examination schedule for LLB students for the Spring 2026 semester has been announced.

bracu_official.summary: The class schedule for the upcoming Summer 2026 semester is now available.

bracu_official.summary: Information regarding the First Year Advising Team (FYAT) for the Summer 2026 semester has been released.

bracu_official.summary: An announcement specifying the final date for fee payments for the Summer 2026 semester.

bracu_official.title: Ashura (Muharram)*-University closed
bracu_official.summary: The university will be closed on June 26th in observance of Ashura (Muharram).

bracu_official.title: BRAC University organizes session on "Classroom to Career: Goal Setting for a Successful Academic & Professional Life"
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University hosted a session designed to help students with goal setting for a successful academic and professional career.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University conducts synergy in action workshop to strengthen workplace effectiveness
bracu_official.summary: A workshop was organized by BRAC University to enhance synergy and improve overall workplace effectiveness.

bracu_official.title: Head of BRAC University's internal audit gets 2026 ACIIA award in Singapore
bracu_official.summary: The head of BRAC University's internal audit department was honored with the 2026 ACIIA award in Singapore.
